_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 2 tumor suppressor protein is expressed in oligodendrocytes and regulates cell proliferation and process formation.

_contextSnippet: Merlin appears as a 70kDa sized band in Western blots, and was detected in all cell lines...In all cell lines the amount of Merlin expressed is lower than in the cerebellum
details: Expressed Merlin as 70kDa band in Western blots at lower levels than cerebellum; showed variable Olig2 expression in almost all cells
